footer.title: Clumoove Migration Platform
footer.copyright: © 2026 All rights reserved. Fast and secure transfers for cloud infrastructures.
footer.bufferText: The data transfer is encrypted and temporarily processed directly in the server's memory. Your transferred data is never permanently stored.

auth.name: Name
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists with this email address, a link has been sent.
auth.totpLocked: Too many failed attempts. The account has been locked for 15 minutes.
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account exists with this email address, a link has been sent.
auth.setNewPassword: For your security, please set a new password to continue.

connect.s3AllowHttp: Allow unencrypted connections (only for local test environments)
connect.magentacloudInfo: Connects to magentacloud.de (WebDAV). Use the dedicated WebDAV password from your MagentaCLOUD account settings — NOT your regular account password.
connect.localInfo: Local storage. Files are read from and written to the server-configured LOCAL_STORAGE_ROOT directory. Enter only a relative path inside that directory — no URL, username, or password is required.

Reads and writes files directly on the server inside the configured LOCAL_STORAGE_ROOT directory. No credentials are required — only enter a relative path within that sandbox (no absolute paths or ".." traversal).
connect.googlePhotosInfo: Connects to Google Photos via the Picker API. You select the exact photos and videos to migrate in a Google Photos tab that opens when you click the button below — Google no longer permits reading the whole library automatically. A dedicated OAuth client with the photospicker.mediaitems.readonly + photoslibrary.appendonly scopes is required. As a target, uploads use the Library API.
connect.googlePhotosPickerOpenHint: A new tab opens where you pick the photos and videos to migrate. Return here after confirming your selection in Google Photos.
connect.googlePhotosPickerWaiting: Waiting for your selection in Google Photos…
connect.googlePhotosPickerConfirmed: Your Google Photos selection is ready for migration.
connect.googlePhotosPickerLoadFailed: The Google Photos picker could not be loaded. You can still start the migration; the selected items will be read at transfer time.
connect.googlePhotosOriginalWarning: Files from Google Photos are downloaded through the Photos API, which never serves byte-identical originals — it re-encodes media and permanently reduces "Storage saver" uploads. We request the largest rendition the API offers, but true originals are only available via a Google Takeout export (takeout.google.com).

appPassword.title: Instructions for creating an application password (Nextcloud / WebDAV)
appPassword.step1: Log in to your Nextcloud via your web browser.
appPassword.step2: Click on your profile picture in the top right corner and select 'Settings'.
appPassword.step3: Go to the 'Security' section in the left-hand menu.
appPassword.step4: Scroll all the way down to 'Devices & applications'.
appPassword.step5: Enter a name (e.g., 'Clumoove') and click 'Create new app password'.
appPassword.step6: Copy the generated password and paste it above (for security reasons, your normal main password often will not work).

errors.sourceSftpHost: Please enter a server address for the source.
errors.sourceSftpKey: Please provide a security key for the source.
errors.targetSftpHost: Please enter a server address for the target.
errors.targetSftpKey: Please provide a security key for the target.
errors.sourceSmb: Please enter a server address and the name of the share for the source.
errors.sourceS3: Please enter the name of the storage folder and the region for the source.
errors.targetSmb: Please enter a server address and the name of the share for the target.
errors.targetS3: Please enter the name of the storage folder and the region for the target.
errors.missingFields: Please fill in all fields or grant access with the respective providers.
errors.connectionFailed: The connection could not be established.
errors.verifyFailed: Connection failed. Please check your credentials.
errors.networkError: A network error occurred. Please check your internet connection.

fileBrowser.title: Select data
fileBrowser.subtitle: Choose what you want to transfer
fileBrowser.targetCopied: Copies the data to the selected folder on the target system.
fileBrowser.skipDesc: Already existing files will not be overwritten on the target system.
fileBrowser.overwriteDesc: Replaces duplicate files on the target system.
fileBrowser.renameDesc: Adds a number to the file name (e.g., file(1).pdf).
fileBrowser.threadsGooglePhotos: Google Photos allows only one simultaneous transfer (API rate limit).
fileBrowser.threadsHighWarn: ⚠️ Running too many simultaneous transfers speeds up the process but may cause the server to slow down your connection.
fileBrowser.threadsHint: More simultaneous transfers speed up the process but place a heavier load on the servers involved.
fileBrowser.scheduleHint: The transfer will start automatically at the selected time. You can cancel the process at any time before then.
fileBrowser.bandwidthHint: Limited to {{limit}} Mbit/s. Can be adjusted during the active transfer.
fileBrowser.targetSelectSubtitle: Choose a folder on the target system

errors.selectOne: Please select at least one folder, calendar, or address book.
errors.futureTime: The scheduled start time must be in the future.
errors.startFailed: The transfer could not be started.
errors.invalidFolderName: Invalid folder name. Slashes and special characters are not allowed.

dashboard.serverUnreachableText: Could not connect to the server. Please make sure the system is running and reload the page.
dashboard.bgGuarantee: The transfer is running in the background on the server. You can safely close this page.
dashboard.connLossText: One of the systems is not responding. The transfer is briefly paused. The system will automatically check accessibility every minute and resume exactly where it was interrupted.
dashboard.threadsHint: More simultaneous transfers speed up the process but load the servers. Changes apply immediately.
dashboard.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this transfer? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.retryConfirm: Do you want to transfer the failed items again?
dashboard.noFailed: No failed items found to retry.
dashboard.downloadFailed: Could not download the error report.
dashboard.bandwidthFailed: Could not change the speed limit.
dashboard.threadsFailed: Could not change the number of simultaneous transfers.

migrations.tagline: Data migration has never been this easy.
migrations.welcomeSub: Manage and monitor your data transfers between different cloud systems live in one central place.
migrations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this transfer? All reports and saved credentials will be permanently removed.

settings.title: Settings

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Reusable connections for faster transfers. Each profile can be used as a source or a target.
connections.noProfiles: No saved connections yet. Create one to reuse it in future transfers.
connections.deleteConfirm: Delete this saved connection? This cannot be undone.
connections.reauthorizeHint: Opens the provider sign-in to refresh the stored access.
connections.usingProfile: Using the saved profile. The connection details are loaded automatically from the server.
connections.saveProfileHint: The entered credentials will be stored encrypted for future transfers.

settings.avatarHint: Upload a new profile picture. Supported formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF up to 2 MB.
settings.avatarCropperHint: Drag to move | Scroll to zoom
settings.emailChangeAvailableHint: Email service not configured – changing email address is currently unavailable.
settings.backupCodesHint: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
settings.qrInvalid: Error generating security code (invalid QR image).
settings.disableHint: Enter your password to disable two-step verification.
settings.setupHint: Add an extra layer of security to your account with a one-time code from a verification app (such as Google Authenticator).
settings.appearanceHint: Choose the app design. 'Automatic' matches your operating system settings.
settings.allowRegistrationsHint: Disable this to block new user registrations. Existing accounts will still be able to log in.
settings.name: Name
settings.deleteAvatarConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your profile picture?
settings.smtpPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
settings.smtpNotifyHint: You will receive an email once a transfer is completed or if it fails.
